---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for EyeOnChess
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Would you be willing to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR for this
- [ ] No, but I'd like to see it implemented
